name: SYoung Group Co., Ltd.
summary: SYoung Group Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sales of skin care products in China. The company offers its products under Yunifang, Xiaomazu, Dadihui, Huayaohua, and Yumen brands. The company was formerly known as Yujiahui Co., Ltd. and changed its name to SYoung Group Co., Ltd. in April 2021. SYoung Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is based in Changsha, China.
